profile.identity_desc: Your avatar is visible to other marketplace participants. Use a professional photo to build trust and increase proposal acceptance.
profile.personal_desc: Manage your account information and contact details.
profile.store_desc: Manage your business identity as a seller.

form.identity_desc: Update your avatar and personal contact details.
form.name: Full Name
form.address_desc: Manage your primary location for deliveries and service.

messages.account_deactivated_desc: You have been logged out. Your data is now hidden.
messages.account_deleted_desc: All your data has been purged.

security_section.deactivation_desc: Temporarily hide your account. You can return anytime.
security_section.deletion_desc: This action is irreversible. All data will be purged.

prompts.deactivate_confirm: Are you sure? This will hide your profile and log you out.
prompts.delete_confirm: Type DELETE to confirm permanent deletion:

security.title: Account Security
security.desc: Protect your account with strong passwords and privacy controls.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.desc: Optimize your experience by choosing where and how you receive marketplace signals.

notifications_section.delivery_desc: Choose how you want to be alerted about new activity.
notifications_section.in_app_desc: Real-time alerts shown in your dashboard.
notifications_section.email_desc: Get detailed updates delivered to your inbox.
notifications_section.seller_strategy_desc: Optimize how you receive leads and market signals.
notifications_section.frequency_desc: Choose between real-time leads or a summary digest.
notifications_section.immediate_desc: Alert me the moment a new request matches my focus.
notifications_section.daily_digest_desc: Receive a single summary of all leads daily.
notifications_section.visibility_desc: Control which brand requests trigger your notifications.
notifications_section.my_specialties_desc: Only notify for brands in my profile specialty list.
notifications_section.global_access_desc: Notify for every single new lead across the platform.
notifications_section.admin_sim_desc: Trigger system-wide events to test real-time notification routing.
notifications_section.spam_test_desc: Emulate a spam flag on a dummy request (#TEST-123).
